text:
Once upon a time in a small forest town, there was a young girl named Luna. She loved exploring the woods behind her house. On special days like Saturdays, she'd wear her pink raincoat and boots and venture further.

One sunny afternoon, Luna came across an old oak tree with gnarly fists. She climbed up bravely. Something stuck out above her...some branches! Fearless, she reached for them.

Then, something strange happened. She slipped, catching herself on a hollow. Down came she! Laughing softly, she climbed up.

That night, Luna dreamt of stars that whispered tales. She woke with a giggle. Today was owl feather day. She dressed in owl clothes. Found some branches in the field.

They felt funny on her head. Singing softly, she danced under the moonlight. Kids played football in the park. Birds watched. She waited. A great owl flew down!

She hugged him. He hooted softly. Together they
